card_description: Jason Taverner is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 3 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick argues that *Flow My Tears* contains "cooked" (divinely inspired/interpolated) material that parallels the Book of Acts with impossible precision."
